core_customizations.reason: Auto-generated script by the Openbravo/Etendo WAD build system. Contains no hand-written logic. Always present and always regenerated on build.

Classic Openbravo HTML report filter templates. These are WAD-generated view files that render report parameter forms via the classic server-side rendering pipeline. They have no custom logic – the diffs consist entirely of cosmetic layout adjustments and whitespace changes introduced by the build tooling. In 25.4.x the new UI (React) renders report parameters via ProcessDefinitionModal, making these files unused. Group of 37 files from src/org/openbravo/erpCommon/ad_reports/ and one from modules_core/org.openbravo.financial.paymentreport/.

Classic HTML form for the Requisition-to-Order conversion process. The 20 added lines are a UI layout adjustment matching the Guaguas Requisition custom process window. Not Java logic – purely a classic HTML form that becomes irrelevant in the React UI. All Requisition-to-Order logic is handled server-side.
Same category as above — classic WAD-generated HTML for the Manage Requisitions window. Small cosmetic diff with no custom logic.
Classic HTML form for GL Posting by Database Tables. The diff contains only whitespace/layout adjustments – no custom logic. In 25.4.x this form is replaced by the React Process Definition pattern.
Classic HTML admin/debug form. No custom logic in the diff – only whitespace adjustments. Admin-only utility not relevant to client operations.

This file contains a Guaguas-specific addition to the Payment window invoice grid: lines 139 and 174 inject a subquery to retrieve the translation label for the custom validation status field 'GGVAL_ValidationStatus' — an em_ extension column from the com.smf.guaguas.invoice.validation module. The change adds a SELECT against ADList/ADListTrl/ADReference to display em_ggval_val_status in the Add Payment grid. This is entirely client-specific logic that belongs in the com.smf.guaguas.invoice.validation or com.smf.guaguas.customization custom modules, not in a patched core file. In 25.4.x this column extension should be registered via the HQL extension mechanism without modifying the base class.
Classic HTML picker for multi-locator selection. The diff is a whitespace/layout adjustment – no custom logic. Obsoleted by React UI selectors in 25.4.x.
Classic Audit Trail popup HTML. Whitespace/layout adjustment only – no custom logic.
Same as AuditTrailPopupHistory – classic popup HTML, layout adjustment only.

The diff adds query timeout imports (SQLTimeoutException, QueryTimeoutException) and extends exception handling logic in the buildCriteria/JSON parsing utilities. Query timeout handling was officially incorporated into Etendo's JSON service layer from 24.3.x onwards. In 25.4.x this is part of the standard codebase – no action needed.

The diff forces the URL scheme to 'https' (line 33: `String scheme = "https"` overriding `request.getScheme()`). This was applied to ensure all generated URLs use HTTPS regardless of the servlet request's detected scheme — a common fix in environments behind HTTPS load balancers or reverse proxies. In 25.4.x, the proper fix is a server-side proxy configuration (X-Forwarded-Proto header processing in Tomcat's RemoteIpValve) rather than a core code patch. This should be removed and replaced with proper reverse proxy configuration.

The diff shows 4 added/4 removed lines in the C_PROJECT table model. Inspection reveals no custom columns were added – the changes are XML attribute reformatting (NVARCHAR vs VARCHAR for ACCOUNTNO column) introduced by the local build tooling's dbsourcemanager. This is a build artifact with no semantic impact. Will be regenerated correctly on 25.4.x.

The diff shows 2 changed lines in the order restrictions trigger. Inspection shows a single line change: `DATEPROMISED` check is commented out (`--OR(COALESCE(...DATEPROMISED...))`). This was a deliberate operational decision to allow editing the promised date on a processed order. This is client-specific business logic that should be implemented as a separate trigger or via the module override mechanism, not as a core patch. In 25.4.x, verify if Etendo standard already allows this via configuration before reimplementing.
Classic HTML template for the Import Bank File action button. The diff is layout whitespace adjustment – no custom logic. Obsoleted by React UI in 25.4.x.
Classic HTML template for Orders Awaiting Delivery report filter. Layout adjustment only – no custom logic.
Compiled .class artifact tracked in source control. No code change. Should never be committed; excluded from migration.

custom_modules.name: Customization Guaguas
custom_modules.description: Core customization module for Guaguas Municipales. Contains multiple business components: (1) Contract management extensions — TypeContract callout generates auto-numbered identifiers using prefix+sequence from contract type; DeleteContract event observer enforces role-based permission check before deleting project/contract records; PrintContract handler generates PDF via Jasper. (2) Warehouse movement callouts — MovementQty initializes locator, UOM, attribute fields when a product is selected in a movement line; OperativeQuantityToBaseQuantity converts alternate UOM quantities to base UOM across 10 different document windows. (3) Custom database functions registered via CDI — smfgcus_int_consumption_post and smfgcus_isincluded_category. (4) Custom report ReportWarehousePartnerJR. (5) Modified core tables: AD_ROLE, AD_USER, M_TRANSACTION, C_PROJECT, M_PRODUCT, C_INVOICELINE, C_INVOICE, C_ORDER, FIN_PAYMENT, FIN_PAYMENT_SCHEDULEDETAIL, M_INTERNAL_CONSUMPTION, FACT_ACCT, A_ASSET, OBCNTR_CONTRACT_TYPE. (6) Database triggers for agreed price validation and date operations. Company branding assets (logos).
custom_modules.generalization_reason: The contract management extensions (TypeContract, DeleteContract, PrintContract) are specific to Guaguas's internal service contract workflow and depend on custom fields in OBCNTR_CONTRACT_TYPE. The UOM callouts are generic enough that they could become part of Etendo's base UOM management, but the exact implementation duplicates logic already available in UOMUtil. The warehouse movement callout overlaps significantly with built-in product selection callouts in the new Etendo versions.
custom_modules.migration_notes: Migrate as a standalone module. AddPaymentOrderInvoicesTransformer injection (the GGVAL status column) must be moved here from the core patch. The deprecated SimpleCallout API used by MovementQty and TypeContract must be refactored to the CDI EventHandler/Callout pattern. Apache Log4j import in PrintContract uses the deprecated org.apache.log4j.Logger — must update to LogManager (breaking change in 25.1.x).

custom_modules.name: custom manage facturae - SII
custom_modules.description: SII (Suministro Inmediato de Información) customization for Guaguas Municipales. Adds an EM_EISII_AUTOREACTIVATE column to C_INVOICE to allow auto-reactivation of invoices that had SII errors. Contains a stored procedure EISII_C_INVOICE_POST_EP that hooks into invoice completion to check and set reactivation flags based on the EISII_CanReactivate preference. Also includes EISII_REACTIVATE_INV function. Extends the base com.qualitic.openbravo.guaguas.sii SII module.
custom_modules.generalization_reason: Entirely specific to Guaguas's SII workflow and the AEAT SII module already present (aeatsii). The auto-reactivate flag is a workaround for a specific operational issue at Guaguas (needing to re-send SII invoices after correction without manual reactivation).
custom_modules.migration_notes: Module is functional and small. Main risk: the base com.smf.ticketbai and AEAT SII modules it depends on are significantly updated (com.smf.ticketbai 1.3.1 → 2.10.0). Verify the em_aeatsii_* field references and the AEATSII_CONFIG table structure are still valid in the target version.

custom_modules.name: template einvoice -SII
custom_modules.description: Template module (configuration data only) for the SII e-invoice customization. Contains only AD_MODULE metadata and configScript.xml — no Java code.
custom_modules.generalization_reason: Pure template/data module with no logic.
custom_modules.migration_notes: Update module version dependency to match com.smf.custom.einvoice.sii new version. No code changes required.

unmaintained_modules.name: Qualitic Guaguas Requisitions Module
unmaintained_modules.author: Qualitic
unmaintained_modules.risk_reason: Client-specific requisition workflow with no public maintainer. No Java source found — likely pure AD configuration module. Depends on Qualitic framework modules. Requires validation that base requisition functionality in 25.4.x covers the workflow.
unmaintained_modules.replacement: Etendo base Manage Requisitions window covers standard requisition flow. Custom workflow steps need manual assessment.

unmaintained_modules.name: Qualitic Guaguas Requisitions Package
unmaintained_modules.author: Qualitic
unmaintained_modules.risk_reason: Framework/infrastructure module for the Qualitic requisitions custom workflow. No maintainer. Needs manual assessment of whether Etendo 25.4.x standard purchasing module covers this.
unmaintained_modules.replacement: Etendo base purchasing module.

unmaintained_modules.name: Qualitic Guaguas Requisitions Template
unmaintained_modules.author: Qualitic
unmaintained_modules.risk_reason: Template/configuration data for the Qualitic requisitions module. Pure AD data, no Java. Risk is indirect — depends on framework above.
unmaintained_modules.replacement: Re-create as Etendo standard configuration if framework is retired.

unmaintained_modules.name: Etiquetas de almacén para Guaguas Municipales
unmaintained_modules.author: Qualitic
unmaintained_modules.risk_reason: Warehouse label printing module specific to Guaguas. No maintainer. Depends on Qualitic utility and printing infrastructure modules. Risk is moderate since label printing is a standalone capability.
unmaintained_modules.replacement: cat.practics.printlabels (also unmaintained) or custom Jasper report.

unmaintained_modules.name: Datos Qualitic para Guaguas Municipales
unmaintained_modules.author: Qualitic
unmaintained_modules.risk_reason: Configuration data module for Qualitic customizations. Pure AD data. Needs review of whether the data still applies in 25.4.x.
unmaintained_modules.replacement: Migrate reference data to Guaguas's own module or Etendo standard.

unmaintained_modules.name: Formularios Qualitic para Guaguas Municipales
unmaintained_modules.author: Qualitic
unmaintained_modules.risk_reason: Classic AD Forms (ad_form) custom implementations for Guaguas. In 25.4.x classic ad_form HTML forms are a major migration risk as the React UI replaces them. Depends on Qualitic framework.
unmaintained_modules.replacement: Reimplement as Process Definitions (PD Action or PD Standard) in the new UI.

unmaintained_modules.name: Informes de Qualitic para Guaguas Municipales
unmaintained_modules.author: Qualitic
unmaintained_modules.risk_reason: Qualitic reports module with 2 OBUIAPP_PROCESS entries (Jasper reports). These use the modern Process Definition pattern (OBUIAPP_Report) which is supported in 25.4.x. Risk is in the Jasper report templates themselves which may use deprecated API.
unmaintained_modules.replacement: Keep, update JasperReports API if needed (6.0.0 → 6.17.0 in 25.1.x).

unmaintained_modules.name: Integración de sistemas para Guaguas Municipales
unmaintained_modules.author: Qualitic
unmaintained_modules.risk_reason: System integration module for Guaguas. The scope and external dependencies are unknown without deeper code inspection, but integration modules typically depend on external APIs, XML parsing libraries, and web service frameworks that may change between versions. No maintainer.
unmaintained_modules.replacement: Reassess integration endpoints; consider migrating to EtendoRX REST services.

unmaintained_modules.name: Plantilla de Qualitic Para Guaguas Municipales
unmaintained_modules.author: Qualitic
unmaintained_modules.risk_reason: Template module (configuration data). No Java logic. Likely just AD module registration.
unmaintained_modules.replacement: Keep, update module version.

unmaintained_modules.name: Extensión de funcionalidad de remesa SEPA
unmaintained_modules.author: Qualitic
unmaintained_modules.risk_reason: Extends SEPA ISO 20022 remittance functionality. Depends on org.openbravo.sepa.iso20022 (unmaintained). SEPA standard itself has not changed but the underlying module dependencies may have API changes.
unmaintained_modules.replacement: Evaluate if Etendo standard SEPA module in 25.4.x covers the needed extensions.

unmaintained_modules.name: SII customizations for Guaguas Municipales
unmaintained_modules.author: Qualitic
unmaintained_modules.risk_reason: SII (Suministro Inmediato de Información) customizations. SII module itself (com.smf.ticketbai) has had a major version jump (1.3.1 → 2.10.0) with significant API changes. The Qualitic SII extension will very likely have broken dependencies.
unmaintained_modules.replacement: Reassess against new com.smf.ticketbai 2.x API. May require partial rewrite.

unmaintained_modules.name: Validaciones personalizadas para GGMM
unmaintained_modules.author: Qualitic
unmaintained_modules.risk_reason: Custom validation rules for Guaguas. Likely EntityPersistenceEventObserver or similar. Risk depends on which Etendo API versions the validators use.
unmaintained_modules.replacement: Keep, validate against 25.4.x EntityPersistenceEventObserver API.

unmaintained_modules.name: Utility classes for a general purpose
unmaintained_modules.author: Qualitic
unmaintained_modules.risk_reason: Shared utility classes used by other Qualitic modules. No maintainer. The Apache Commons Lang dependency must be updated (org.apache.commons.lang.* → org.apache.commons.lang3.* in 25.1.x). Apache Commons Collections similarly.
unmaintained_modules.replacement: Keep, update library imports.

unmaintained_modules.name: Qualitic Physical Inventory
unmaintained_modules.author: Qualitic
unmaintained_modules.risk_reason: Physical inventory management module. Overlaps with the Etendo subapp modules for inventory. No maintainer.
unmaintained_modules.replacement: Evaluate against com.etendoerp.guaguas.subapp.inventory and Etendo standard physical inventory.

unmaintained_modules.name: Qualitic Physical Consumption Guaguas
unmaintained_modules.author: Qualitic
unmaintained_modules.risk_reason: Physical consumption extension specific to Guaguas. Depends on com.qualitic.physicalinventory above.
unmaintained_modules.replacement: Depends on parent module decision.

unmaintained_modules.name: Facturación Electrónica para FACe
unmaintained_modules.author: SMF Consulting
unmaintained_modules.risk_reason: FACe (Punto General de Entrada de Facturas de las Administraciones Públicas) integration module. Uses JAX-WS web services (org.openbravo.util.jaxws dependency) and SOAP with Attachments (org.openbravo.util.saaj.impl) which are deprecated and removed in Java 17+ contexts. In 26.1.x the javax.* namespace migration (jakarta.*) would also apply. Critical for Guaguas as a public entity required to send invoices to the government's FACe portal.
unmaintained_modules.replacement: Rewrite using modern HTTP client or reuse existing SMF FACe library with Jakarta EE namespace updates.

unmaintained_modules.name: Reportes adicionales Guaguas
unmaintained_modules.author: SMF Consulting
unmaintained_modules.risk_reason: Additional Jasper reports for Guaguas. Pure reporting module. JasperReports API upgrade (6.0.0 → 6.17.0) in 25.1.x may require font or API updates.
unmaintained_modules.replacement: Keep, update JasperReports API references if needed.

unmaintained_modules.name: Invoice Validation
unmaintained_modules.author: SMF Consulting
unmaintained_modules.risk_reason: Invoice validation module with 3 OBUIAPP_PROCESS entries. Adds the GGVAL_ValidationStatus custom status to invoices (referenced in the core patch of AddPaymentOrderInvoicesTransformer). The core patch migration must be coordinated with this module.
unmaintained_modules.replacement: Keep. Migrate core patch into this module using HQL datasource extension instead of core class modification.

unmaintained_modules.name: Modulo de ventas para la Tarjeta LPA Movilidad
unmaintained_modules.author: SMF Consulting
unmaintained_modules.risk_reason: Sales module for LPA (Tarjeta de Transportes de Gran Canaria) mobility card integration. Has Java sources (AddPaymentProcess, SalesUtils, InvoicePendingOrderService). Depends on Openbravo Retail/WebPOS infrastructure (org.openbravo.retail.posterminal) which has major version changes in 25.x.
unmaintained_modules.replacement: Keep, validate against new WebPOS/Retail module APIs. May depend on com.smf.guaguas.webpos.customizations.

unmaintained_modules.name: Redmine Integration
unmaintained_modules.author: SMF Consulting
unmaintained_modules.risk_reason: Redmine project management tool integration. Provides ChangeProjectTransformer (HQL transformer for projects) and LoadProjectsAndWatchersActionHandler. Depends on external Redmine API. Risk is moderate — Etendo API for HQL transformers and ActionHandlers is stable.
unmaintained_modules.replacement: Keep, validate that Redmine API endpoint is still accessible and compatible.

unmaintained_modules.name: Guaguas SII Trigger Functions Customizations
unmaintained_modules.author: SMF Consulting
unmaintained_modules.risk_reason: Database trigger function customizations for the SII module. Tightly coupled to com.smf.ticketbai which has had a major version jump (1.3.1 → 2.10.0). Trigger functions reference AEAT SII tables that may have changed.
unmaintained_modules.replacement: Reassess against com.smf.ticketbai 2.x. Coordinate with com.qualitic.openbravo.guaguas.sii.

unmaintained_modules.name: Guaguas Template
unmaintained_modules.author: SMF Consulting
unmaintained_modules.risk_reason: Template/configuration module. No Java code expected. Pure AD data.
unmaintained_modules.replacement: Keep, update version.

unmaintained_modules.name: Personalizaciones WebPOS en Guaguas
unmaintained_modules.author: SMF Consulting
unmaintained_modules.risk_reason: WebPOS (Web Point of Sale) customizations. The entire Openbravo Retail / WebPOS stack (org.openbravo.retail.posterminal) is deprecated in favor of EtendoPOS in newer versions. This module is directly at risk of becoming orphaned if Guaguas migrates away from WebPOS.
unmaintained_modules.replacement: EtendoPOS or reassess if Guaguas still uses WebPOS. If retained, validate against org.openbravo.retail.posterminal latest version.

unmaintained_modules.name: Columnas adicionales PC
unmaintained_modules.author: SMF
unmaintained_modules.risk_reason: Additional columns on Purchase Order. Pure AD extension module. No expected breaking changes.
unmaintained_modules.replacement: Keep, update version.

unmaintained_modules.name: Additional PO Columns Template
unmaintained_modules.author: SMF
unmaintained_modules.risk_reason: Template data for above module.
unmaintained_modules.replacement: Keep, update version.

unmaintained_modules.name: Optimizacion de Reportes
unmaintained_modules.author: SMF
unmaintained_modules.risk_reason: Report optimization module. Likely uses com.exos.erp.reportcachemanagement pattern. JasperReports API upgrade applicable.
unmaintained_modules.replacement: Keep, update JasperReports API if needed.

unmaintained_modules.name: SMF Legacy Columns
unmaintained_modules.author: SMF
unmaintained_modules.risk_reason: Legacy column compatibility module. By name, likely maintains backward-compatible column mappings for DB migrations. Must be assessed to verify it doesn't conflict with 25.4.x schema changes.
unmaintained_modules.replacement: Assess for removal once migration to 25.4.x data model is complete.

unmaintained_modules.name: Utilities & Common Code
unmaintained_modules.author: MySuite
unmaintained_modules.risk_reason: Third-party utility library from MySuite (unknown vendor). No git_url, no Etendo catalog entry. Apache Commons Lang/Collections usage is a certainty in utility modules — breaking package rename in 25.1.x. No way to obtain updated version through standard channels.
unmaintained_modules.replacement: Audit all usages; replace with standard Etendo utilities or inline the required functions.

unmaintained_modules.name: Facturación Electrónica España
unmaintained_modules.author: MySuite
unmaintained_modules.risk_reason: Spanish electronic invoicing (Facturae) from MySuite. No maintainer, no catalog entry. Depends on org.openbravo.module.facturae, facturae31, facturae32 modules (all unmaintained). The Facturae XML generation likely uses javax.xml.bind (JAXB) which was removed from Java 11+ and requires explicit dependency in Java 17 — critical breaking change in 25.1.x/26.1.x.
unmaintained_modules.replacement: Evaluate replacement by com.smf.custom.einvoice.sii + official com.etendoerp SII modules, or seek a maintained Facturae implementation.

unmaintained_modules.name: P&L and Balance Sheet export to excel
unmaintained_modules.author: GPS/Openbravo
unmaintained_modules.risk_reason: Excel export using Apache POI. POI has a major API restructuring in 25.1.x (3.10.1 → 5.4.0): CELL_TYPE_* constants → CellType enum, Font.setBoldweight() → Font.setBold(), etc. Requires code update.
unmaintained_modules.replacement: Keep, update Apache POI API calls.

unmaintained_modules.name: Initial Data Load Extension for Invoices
unmaintained_modules.author: GPS/Openbravo
unmaintained_modules.risk_reason: IDL extension for invoice import. Depends on org.openbravo.idl (also unmaintained). Low risk if only used for data migration, not runtime.
unmaintained_modules.replacement: Assess whether still needed. If used for ongoing data entry, validate IDL API compatibility.

unmaintained_modules.name: Modulo Subapp de Movimiento entre Almacenes
unmaintained_modules.author: Etendo/Guaguas
unmaintained_modules.risk_reason: Etendo RX subapp for warehouse movements. Has web services (PrintMovementWebService, CreateMovementWS). Depends on com.etendoerp.etendorx (1.9.1 → 3.15.1 — major version jump). EtendoRX API changes between 1.x and 3.x are significant.
unmaintained_modules.replacement: Keep, update to com.etendoerp.etendorx 3.x API.

unmaintained_modules.name: Modulo Subapp de Consumos Internos
unmaintained_modules.author: Etendo/Guaguas
unmaintained_modules.risk_reason: EtendoRX subapp for internal consumption management. Same EtendoRX API version gap as above (1.9.1 → 3.15.1).
unmaintained_modules.replacement: Keep, update to EtendoRX 3.x API.

unmaintained_modules.name: Modulo Subapp de Inventarios
unmaintained_modules.author: Etendo/Guaguas
unmaintained_modules.risk_reason: EtendoRX subapp for inventory management with user assignment handlers. Same EtendoRX version gap.
unmaintained_modules.replacement: Keep, update to EtendoRX 3.x API.

unmaintained_modules.name: Modulo Subapp de Pedidos Pendientes de Recibir
unmaintained_modules.author: Etendo/Guaguas
unmaintained_modules.risk_reason: EtendoRX subapp for pending purchase orders / material receipt. Same EtendoRX version gap.
unmaintained_modules.replacement: Keep, update to EtendoRX 3.x API.

unmaintained_modules.name: Modulo Subapp de Productos
unmaintained_modules.author: Etendo/Guaguas
unmaintained_modules.risk_reason: EtendoRX subapp for product management. Same EtendoRX version gap.
unmaintained_modules.replacement: Keep, update to EtendoRX 3.x API.

unmaintained_modules.name: Plantilla Subaplicaciones Guaguas
unmaintained_modules.author: Etendo/Guaguas
unmaintained_modules.risk_reason: Template module for Guaguas subapps. Pure configuration.
unmaintained_modules.replacement: Keep, update version.

unmaintained_modules.name: Etendo Analytics Exporter
unmaintained_modules.author: Futit Services S.L.
unmaintained_modules.risk_reason: Analytics data export module. No version in catalog (null latest_version reported). Has tests (BaseAnalyticsTest, DataExtractionServiceTest). Risk depends on whether analytics API changed between versions.
unmaintained_modules.replacement: Assess against Etendo catalog — may have been superseded.

unmaintained_modules.name: Etendo Advanced Security WebPOS
unmaintained_modules.author: Futit Services S.L.
unmaintained_modules.risk_reason: Security extension for WebPOS. Depends on WebPOS stack (also at risk). If WebPOS is retired, this module has no purpose.
unmaintained_modules.replacement: Evaluate with WebPOS migration decision.

unmaintained_modules.name: System Customization
unmaintained_modules.author: unknown
unmaintained_modules.risk_reason: Generic customization template with non-standard package naming (mySystem.*). Likely a leftover template module from initial implementation. Contents and purpose unclear without deeper inspection.
unmaintained_modules.replacement: Assess for consolidation into com.smf.guaguas.customization or removal.

unmaintained_modules.name: Contract Management Infrastructure
unmaintained_modules.author: Openbravo S.L.U.
unmaintained_modules.risk_reason: Openbravo-authored contract management module (not Etendo). This is the base module that com.smf.guaguas.customization's contract features (TypeContract, DeleteContract, PrintContract) depend on. Not in Etendo's official catalog. The OBCNTR_CONTRACT_TYPE table is defined here.
unmaintained_modules.replacement: Evaluate if Etendo 25.4.x includes a native Service Contract module. If not, this must be migrated as a local module.

unmaintained_modules.name: Service Contract Management
unmaintained_modules.author: Openbravo S.L.U.
unmaintained_modules.risk_reason: Service contract management built on the above. Same considerations.
unmaintained_modules.replacement: Same as org.openbravo.contract.

unmaintained_modules.name: Multi-Dimensional Financial Reports Infrastructure
unmaintained_modules.author: Openbravo S.L.U.
unmaintained_modules.risk_reason: Financial dimensional reports infrastructure. Openbravo-authored but not in Etendo catalog. Likely available as part of Financial Reports Advanced bundle in Etendo 25.4.x.
unmaintained_modules.replacement: com.etendoerp.financial.reports.advanced (already installed, version 1.9.1).

unmaintained_modules.name: Web POS
unmaintained_modules.author: Openbravo S.L.U.
unmaintained_modules.risk_reason: The entire Openbravo for Retail / WebPOS stack is in the unmaintained list. This is a significant dependency for Guaguas's LPA (transport card) sales module. In 25.4.x+ the Etendo roadmap moves toward EtendoPOS.
unmaintained_modules.replacement: EtendoPOS or maintained Retail module from Etendo catalog.

unmaintained_modules.name: SEPA Framework and Utilities
unmaintained_modules.author: Openbravo S.L.U.
unmaintained_modules.risk_reason: SEPA payment infrastructure. Not in Etendo catalog but SEPA standard is stable. Used by com.qualitic.openbravo.guaguas.sepa.iso20022.extension.
unmaintained_modules.replacement: Look for Etendo-native SEPA module or keep as local module.

unmaintained_modules.name: Procurement Contracts
unmaintained_modules.author: Openbravo S.L.U.
unmaintained_modules.risk_reason: Procurement contract management. Not in Etendo catalog. Used alongside the Service Contract modules.
unmaintained_modules.replacement: Evaluate with Service Contract stack migration.

unmaintained_modules.name: Print Report Labels
unmaintained_modules.author: Practics
unmaintained_modules.risk_reason: Label printing module from Practics. Unknown maintainer state. Depends on classic Jasper printing infrastructure.
unmaintained_modules.replacement: com.qualitic.openbravo.guaguas.etiquetas (also unmaintained) or modern Jasper implementation.

unmaintained_modules.name: TicketBAI Integration (version gap note)
unmaintained_modules.author: SMF Consulting
unmaintained_modules.risk_reason: Although com.smf.ticketbai is in gradle_source (maintained), the version gap is extreme: installed 1.3.1 vs latest 2.10.0. All SII/TicketBAI-dependent custom modules (com.smf.guaguas.sii, com.qualitic.openbravo.guaguas.sii, com.smf.custom.einvoice.sii) are directly at risk due to this major version jump in the base SII module.
unmaintained_modules.replacement: Upgrade com.smf.ticketbai to 2.10.0 as a prerequisite; validate all dependent SII modules.

api_breaking_changes.change: Apache Commons Collections 3.2.2 → 4.4: package org.apache.commons.collections → org.apache.commons.collections4
api_breaking_changes.impact: All custom modules using Commons Collections (com.smf.guaguas.customization, com.qualitic.openbravo.utilities, com.mysuite.* modules)

api_breaking_changes.change: Apache Commons Lang 2.6 → 3.17: package org.apache.commons.lang.* → org.apache.commons.lang3.*
api_breaking_changes.impact: MovementQty callout uses org.apache.commons.lang.StringUtils. All Qualitic and MySuite custom modules. High impact across unmaintained portfolio.

api_breaking_changes.change: Apache POI 3.10.1 → 5.4.0: Cell.CELL_TYPE_* constants → CellType enum; Font.setBoldweight() → Font.setBold(); CellStyle alignment constants restructured
JasperReports 6.0.0 → 6.17.0: font and core API updates
Gradle wrapper updated from 7.3.2 to 8.12.1 — manual update required
api_breaking_changes.impact: Build configuration for all custom modules

api_breaking_changes.change: Java 11 support removed — Java 17+ mandatory. javax.* namespace → jakarta.* (relevant for JAX-WS, SOAP)
api_breaking_changes.impact: com.smf.face (FACe integration) — uses javax.jws, javax.xml.soap which become jakarta.* in Java 17 context. com.mysuite.factelectr.es.module likely uses JAXB (javax.xml.bind).

api_breaking_changes.change: org.apache.commons:commons-compress removed from classpath — modules must add explicit dependency
api_breaking_changes.impact: Any custom module using commons-compress (e.g. zip file handling)

api_breaking_changes.change: CRM Connector tables (C_ExtBP_Config*) and columns (C_Extbp_Enabled, C_Extbp_Config_ID) removed
api_breaking_changes.impact: Low — Guaguas does not appear to use CRM Connector

sections.reason: 312 Maintain, 41 Transaction, 12 Query, 53 P&E windows found. Basic structures implemented. Key gaps: DocAction labels incorrect, Posted button 3-state not complete, ChangeProjectStatus not implemented.

Core types (String, Integer, Amount, Number, Quantity, Date, DateTime, Time, List, TableDir, YesNo, Password, Text) implemented. NOT implemented: Rich Text (1 column found), Image (20 columns), Link (42 columns), Binary, Upload File, Color, Assignment, Multi-Selector, SelectorAsLink, Button List. Missing: Out Parameters on selectors (0 found but important gap).
DocAction: core working but labels incorrect (6 docaction columns, 50 Posted tables). CreateFrom: implemented as PD. Posted: 3-state visual not complete. ChangeProjectStatus: not implemented (0%).

38 PD Actions and 172 PD Standard processes — both partially validated. 10 OBUIAPP_Report processes — working. 241 PD Manual JS processes — BLOQUEADO (OB.* namespaces do not exist in React). 9 background processes — 10% complete (no Process Monitor integration). 20 active ad_form forms — 15% complete (decision required: iframe vs React reimplementation).
3,047 field display logic expressions found. Bug: @field_name@ syntax causes JavaScript errors. Operators =, !=, >, <, &, | partially work. Callout-triggered re-evaluation not validated.
509 child tabs found. SR tabs, grandchild tabs (level 2), lazy loading not validated. 3 tree tabs found (HASTREE=Y).
385 columns with callout references in core AD_COLUMN. GlobalCalloutManager implemented. Chaining prevention, WARNING/ERROR response, selector re-filtering not validated.
41 Transaction windows. IP status handling, RE status, visual colors/icons per status not validated.

197 total OBUISEL selectors (86 core + 111 modules). Out Parameters: 0 instances found in AD (not required here). TableDir, GenericSelector implemented. Selector popup extra columns/filter fields not validated.
Grid with sorting, filtering, pagination, ED mode, export implemented. isselectioncolumn, default sort from orderbycolumn, operator selection, column config persistence gaps.
Audit fields, org/client filtering, active filtering, attachments, copy record, zoom links partially validated. Copy Record child tab flags not validated.
JWT in progress. Multi-tab logout, token renewal, role switching full reset not implemented.
Menu with 312+41+12+53 windows. Menu API format, icon types, Recent Items persistence, Breadcrumb not fully validated.
FormInitializationComponent modes implemented. Default value @ColumnName@ reactivity gap. Optimistic locking not validated.
10 OBUIAPP_Report processes via ProcessDefinitionModal. Legacy R&P reports (HTML/iframe) at 50%.
Message bar with SUCCESS/ERROR/WARNING/INFO implemented. Design spec details (500ms debounce, ARIA) not validated.
Field formatting parity, readonly logic parity, 43 keyboard shortcuts, toolbar button order parity pending validation.

16 standard buttons implemented. Missing: NEW_ROW distinct from NEW, SAVE_CLOSE. Personalization (personalization, manageviews) buttons absent. Module buttons: Copilot implemented; EtendoRX Init not validated.

20 active ad_form forms found. Decision required: iframe (requires classic UI running) vs React reimplementation. Critical forms: InitialClientSetup, Enterprise Module Mgmt, Create Invoices from Orders, GL Posting by Tables.
LinkedItemsActionHandler format, access filtering, navigation to new MDI tab not validated.
Search API endpoint, debounce, result ranking, translation-aware search not validated.

42 widget classes found but 0 configured dashboard widget instances. Widget API contract for custom JS widgets undefined. URL Widget, Query Widget, Reference Widget, Custom JS Widget all unimplemented.
77 field groups found. Collapse/expand implemented. Translated names from ad_fieldgroup_trl and state persistence between records not validated.
Previous/Next navigation, show-in-status-bar real-time update not validated.
seqno, startrow, startnewline, numcolumn implemented. Exact interaction algorithm and label alignment parity not validated.
Server computes defaults in NEW mode. @ColumnName@ dynamic defaults not reactive client-side. SQL defaults work via server round-trip.
TabBuilder.java does not send hqlFilterClause or orderByClause to UI. Neither does the UI consume them. Requires verification whether datasource REST auto-applies tab filters server-side.
MDI implemented. Tab state recovery post-crash, tab title format with record identifier, Workspace tab non-closeable not validated.
43+ shortcuts documented. Ctrl+S, Ctrl+D, Ctrl+Delete partially validated. preventDefault for all shortcuts, Escape priority order, suppression in text inputs not validated.
3 tree tabs (HASTREE=Y) found. Toggle, drag&drop with 3 zones, circular reference prevention implemented. Missing: lazy loading for large trees, tree search/filter, keyboard navigation.
Grouping partially implemented. OBUIAPP_GroupingEnabled preference check, FK column display names in group headers not validated.
Import buffer UI, import format definition, reprocess endpoint not implemented.
Alert polling (50s) mentioned. API endpoint, acknowledge, badge count, 401 handling not validated. 0 active alert rules configured in this installation.
personalization and manageviews toolbar buttons absent. OBUIAPP_UIPersonalization not implemented. 0 view personalization records found in installation.
No calendar view windows identified in this installation. No widget instances configured. Not a priority for Guaguas Municipales profile.
4-state layout toggle implemented. MIN state, split ratio persistence, SR tab always-form behavior, animation not validated.

critical_gaps: PD Manual JS processes (241 instances) — OB.* namespace blocker
Application Forms / ad_form (20 active) — architecture decision required
Tab Default Filters section 26 (all 509 child tabs potentially affected)
important_gaps: Selector Out Parameters (0 found in this install — low priority)
guaguas_specific: Guaguas uses WebPOS/Retail (org.openbravo.retail.posterminal) — full retail UI path must be validated if EtendoPOS is not adopted
Custom OBUIAPP processes in com.smf.guaguas.customization (3 processes), com.smf.guaguas.invoice.validation (3 processes) must be validated as PD Standard/Action
PrintContract, PrintInternalConsumption, PrintPartialPurchaseOrderLine use JRManager — validate PD Report path in new UI
FACe integration (com.smf.face) uses JAX-WS SOAP — not a UI concern but blocks SaaS deployment
